notes:
New OPTiC logo, now the app icon on desktop and taskbar
Sort any column - including inside Groups - and your sort sticks through refreshes and restarts
Prestige Monitor: lords idle longest now lead, and Last Gain no longer reads as live activity
Delete alerts outright, not just snooze; they return only if the problem happens again
Add notes from the Hero, Items and Cities panels
Side panel and Configuration no longer scroll
Scripts page was showing every script one version behind
